title: hearth-loom.pr.opened v1
description: Emitted by hearth-loom's Publisher.PublishPROpened (internal/bus/publisher.go) when autoloom or the executor successfully creates a GitHub PR for a bead. Consumed by the operator dashboard and milestones watcher for per-bead PR-URL surfacing and cycle-time metrics. Source: /hearth-loom.

bead_id.description: Bead id this PR was opened for.

execution_id.description: Loomie execution identifier — correlates to loom.lifecycle.v1 execution_id.

branch.description: Head branch the PR was opened from.

repo.description: Repository the PR was opened against.

commit_sha.description: HEAD commit SHA of the PR branch at open time.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the event was published.
